creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rakuco
Date: Sun Jan  5 15:50:50 2014
New Revision: 338789
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/338789

Log:
  1. Handle removed bind in FreeBSD-HEAD and FreeBSD-10, dns/zkt depends on
     dns/bin99 port in these cases. That fixes an error on the FreeBSD package
     build server.
  2. Support staging.
  3. Support LICENSE framework.
  
  PR:		ports/185267
  Submitted by:	Frank Behrens <frank@harz2014.behrens.de> (maintainer)

Added:
  head/dns/zkt/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/dns/zkt/Makefile

Modified: head/dns/zkt/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/dns/zkt/Makefile	Sun Jan  5 15:44:11 2014	(r338788)
+++ head/dns/zkt/Makefile	Sun Jan  5 15:50:50 2014	(r338789)
@@ -3,41 +3,39 @@
 
 PORTNAME=		zkt
 DISTVERSION=		1.1.2
+PORTREVISION=		1
 CATEGORIES=		dns
 MASTER_SITES=		http://www.hznet.de/dns/zkt/
 
 MAINTAINER=		frank@harz2014.behrens.de
 COMMENT=		Tool to manage keys and signatures for DNSSEC-zones
 
-DIR_NAMED_CONF?=	/etc/namedb
+LICENSE=		BSD3CLAUSE
+LICENSE_FILE=		${WRKSRC}/LICENSE
+
+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+.if ${OSVERSION} >= 1000055
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	dnssec-signzone:${PORTSDIR}/dns/bind99
+RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
+.endif
 
-PLIST_FILES=		sbin/zkt-conf \
-			sbin/zkt-keyman \
-			sbin/zkt-ls \
-			sbin/zkt-signer \
-			sbin/zkt-soaserial
-MAN8=			dnssec-zkt.8 \
-			zkt-conf.8 \
-			zkt-keyman.8 \
-			zkt-ls.8 \
-			zkt-signer.8
+DIR_NAMED_CONF?=	/etc/namedb
 GNU_CONFIGURE=		yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-configpath=${DIR_NAMED_CONF}
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/var/named/|${DIR_NAMED_CONF}/|g' ${WRKSRC}/man/*.8
 
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/zkt-conf ${PREFIX}/sbin/
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/zkt-keyman ${PREFIX}/sbin/
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/zkt-ls ${PREFIX}/sbin/
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/zkt-signer ${PREFIX}/sbin/
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/zkt-soaserial ${PREFIX}/sbin/
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/dnssec-zkt.8 ${PREFIX}/man/man8/
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/zkt-conf.8 ${PREFIX}/man/man8/
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/zkt-keyman.8 ${PREFIX}/man/man8/
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/zkt-ls.8 ${PREFIX}/man/man8/
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/zkt-signer.8 ${PREFIX}/man/man8/
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/zkt-conf ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/sbin/
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/zkt-keyman ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/sbin/
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/zkt-ls ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/sbin/
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/zkt-signer ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/sbin/
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/zkt-soaserial ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/sbin/
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/dnssec-zkt.8 ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/man/man8/
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/zkt-conf.8 ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/man/man8/
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/zkt-keyman.8 ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/man/man8/
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/zkt-ls.8 ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/man/man8/
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/man/zkt-signer.8 ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/man/man8/
 
-.include <bsd.port.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Added: head/dns/zkt/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/dns/zkt/pkg-plist	Sun Jan  5 15:50:50 2014	(r338789)
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+man/man8/dnssec-zkt.8.gz
+man/man8/zkt-conf.8.gz
+man/man8/zkt-keyman.8.gz
+man/man8/zkt-ls.8.gz
+man/man8/zkt-signer.8.gz
+sbin/zkt-conf
+sbin/zkt-keyman
+sbin/zkt-ls
+sbin/zkt-signer
+sbin/zkt-soaserial
_______________________________________________
